ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd

# Load the CSV file
file_path = '/mnt/data/assistant-WChzXcBK1VSbAeF9TZo9Ly-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Display the first few rows of the dataframe
data.head()

# Filter the data for the TRANSPORTATION sector
transportation_data = data[data['sector'] == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Convert operating profit to numeric for plotting
transportation_data['operating_profit'] = pd.to_numeric(transportation_data['operating_profit'], errors='coerce')

# Plot the bar chart
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.bar(transportation_data['name'], transportation_data['operating_profit'])
plt.xlabel('Company Name')
plt.ylabel('Operating Profit')
plt.title('Operating Profit in the TRANSPORTATION Sector')
plt.xticks(rotation=90)
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the plot as an image file
image_path = '/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit.png'
plt.savefig(image_path)

# Display the plot
plt.show()

image_path

content.text:
Here is the bar chart for the operating profit in the TRANSPORTATION sector. You can download the image file using the link below:

[Download the chart](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit.png)
